title: portulaca pilosa var. hirsutissima
intro: Portulaca pilosa var. hirsutissima is a type of flowering plant in the purslane family that is native to Asia and is also known as hairy or velvety purslane. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and has been shown to have antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
